ATTY. NITOY SINGH APPEARING FOR NON-PARTY YELP INC.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
NON PARTY YELP INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Off calendar. Please contact Department 514 at (415) 551-3788 and re-schedule the motion before Judge Sullivan. The moving party seeks to vacate or modify Judge Sullivan's judgment and he should make the determination regarding the propriety of that request. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Continued To Jul-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Hearing On Application For Default Judgment And Request For Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Dawn L. Hassell, Esq., and Andrew T. Haling, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DAWN HASSELL.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AVA BIRD.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 25 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Dawn L. Hassell sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Economic Damages : $54,000.00
Legal cost $3,918.85
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
General damages:$500,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $557,918.85
It is further ordered that: Plaintiffs' Request for Injunctive Relief is Granted. Defendant AVA BIRD is ordered to remove each and every defamatory review published or caused to be published by her about plaintiffs HASSELL LAW GROUP and DAWN HASSELL from yelp.com and from anywhere elese they appear on the internet within 5 business days of the date of the court's order.
Defendant AVA BIRD, her agents, officers, employees or representatives, or anyone acting on her behalf, are further enjoined from published any written reviews, commentary, or descriptions of DAWN HASSELL or the HASSELL LAW GROUP on Yelp.com or any other internet location or website.
Yelp.com is ordered to remove all reviews posted by AVA BIRD under user names "Birdzeye B." and 'J.D." attached hereto as Exhibit A and any subsequent comments of these revieweres within 7 business days of the date of the court's order.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
